title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Protocol Recall
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a skill test and release harness after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Instruction Tests · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Which action demonstrates Instruction Tests without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.

content.text: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Instruction Tests, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a skill test and release harness.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A readable SKILL.md guarantees correct execution. This fails the Instruction Tests contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: MCP Security Best Practices (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls authorization threats, confused deputy, injection, SSRF, and mitigation practice.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Usage Feedback trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.

content.text: For Usage Feedback, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

stimulus.title: Usage Feedback case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: More instructions always fix skill reliability.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill. Artifact under review: a skill test and release harness.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Usage Feedback, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Usage Feedback applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
